info.description: Bare-bones FAQ page template. FAQ items/accordion/TOC land in a later pass (INTORG-749). MDX is always stored flat under src/content/faq/ (or faq/es/).

title.description: Used for the browser tab <title> and meta title. Distinct from the on-page Heading below.

pathSlug.description: Full path from the site root, no leading slash. Can be nested under other sections' paths, e.g. grant/education/on-campus/faq.

section.description: Site section for routing and breadcrumbs. Does not affect MDX file location.

description.description: 120–160 characters. Used for SEO meta description and card text.

heading.description: The on-page heading shown at the top of the page. Distinct from Page Title (used for the browser tab and meta title).

introParagraph.description: Optional single paragraph shown below the heading. FAQ items, accordion, and table of contents are added in a later pass.
